summary: Backend regression after GitHub migration complete. 26/26 pytest tests passed (100%) covering catalog, auth, admin, cart (guest), wishlist, orders, settings, shipping, and chatbot. Shipping destination/cost correctly return 503 (RAJAONGKIR_API_KEY empty - documented as expected). Admin login (Admin/Kodok5561) works, AI chatbot (EMERGENT_LLM_KEY) returns valid replies.

minor.issue: Return 503 because RAJAONGKIR_API_KEY is empty in backend/.env. Documented as expected per request - not a bug. Configure the key to enable real shipping integration.

action_items: OPTIONAL: Set RAJAONGKIR_API_KEY in /app/backend/.env to enable live shipping search/cost endpoints (currently 503).
OPTIONAL CODE REVIEW: server.py is ~1070 lines and growing - consider splitting into routers (auth, products, orders, admin, shipping, chat) for maintainability.
OPTIONAL CODE REVIEW: /api/auth/me has no try/except around get_current_user; relies on framework, which is fine but consider explicit 401 messaging consistent with other endpoints.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py exceeds 700 lines (1067 lines) - violates file-size guideline; recommend modularizing into APIRouter modules.

ADMIN_PASSWORD env var (Admin123!) is unused at runtime because ADMIN_PANEL_PASSWORD (Kodok5561) is force-applied during seed (line 1013-1014). Either remove ADMIN_PASSWORD from .env or document precedence to avoid confusion.

Cookies set with secure=False even in production preview (https). Recommend secure=True when FRONTEND_URL is https to comply with browser SameSite=None requirements (currently uses lax so OK, but worth review).

DELETE /api/products/{id} only marks is_active=false but GET /api/products/{id} still returns inactive products with no flag check (line 393-401). Minor leak - list endpoint filters correctly, single-item endpoint does not.
Brute-force lockout uses request.client.host which behind k8s ingress may map to a single proxy IP, potentially affecting many users. Consider X-Forwarded-For aware throttling.
test_credentials: Admin panel: username=Admin password=Kodok5561 (POST /api/auth/admin-login). Email fallback: admin@almiraflorist.com / Kodok5561.
seed_data_creation: Backend auto-seeds 5 categories, 12 products, 1 store settings doc, and admin user on startup. Test file creates TEST_ prefixed users/categories/products on demand.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Reuse /app/backend/tests/test_almira_backend.py for regression. All 26 endpoints validated. Frontend testing was explicitly skipped this round; resume frontend coverage when requested. Note that admin auth is cookie-based - the session fixture relies on requests.Session storing the access_token cookie.
rca of the issue: N/A - no bugs found. Initial test failure (test_register_login_me) was due to case-sensitivity in the test assertion; backend correctly lowercases emails. Test was updated to compare case-insensitively.
